active_visual_authorities.role: sole theme, token, component-default, focus, motion, shape and elevation authority

resolved_findings.resolution: Routes now use MUI Chip only for compact state or metadata; counts use Typography and operational status includes text plus non-color cues.

resolved_findings.finding: Card and border grammar was the default structure
resolved_findings.resolution: Workspace, Knowledge, Channels, Runtime and Control Tower were recomposed with MUI lists, tables, sections, dividers and continuous surfaces.

resolved_findings.finding: Shared empty, error and disclosure states were incomplete
resolved_findings.resolution: All active routes use MUI Alert, CircularProgress, Accordion, Dialog and route-bounded empty states. The custom generic component layer was deleted.

resolved_findings.finding: Workspace JSX and CSS selectors had drifted
resolved_findings.resolution: Workspace rendering was rebuilt with MUI and both Workspace stylesheets were deleted.

resolved_findings.finding: Case journey lacked a dominant visual structure
resolved_findings.resolution: The MUI Workspace renders a truthful Case Spine from available durable facts and explicitly marks missing closure facts.
Domain mapping functions remain, while all generic rendering consumes MUI and the single Nexus theme.
Navigation now uses 案例处理、知识与流程、渠道管理、系统运行、运营监控; technical IDs are progressively disclosed.

resolved_findings.finding: Runtime audit had an independent minified CSS system
resolved_findings.resolution: Runtime evidence audit was migrated to MUI and its stylesheet was deleted.

route_results.functional_behavior_preserved: queue, deep links, drafts, actions, authorization, confirmations and refresh
search, selection, draft guard, edit, publish and retrieval test
account health and onboarding task lifecycle
runtime reads, metrics and evidence audit
compatibility redirect only; no operator UI

remaining_acceptance: Regenerate package-lock.json from the exact package.json manifest.
Run architecture, lint, typecheck, contract tests and production build on one unchanged Head.
Run browser evidence at 375, 768, 1024 and 1440 widths.
Verify keyboard, focus, reduced motion, zoom, long content, degraded states and large lists.
Obtain independent exact-head review before merge.
